human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to run advisory gates after verification: /gsd-code-review 25.2, /gsd-secure-phase 25.2, /gsd-extract-learnings 25.2
human_actions_pending.context: These are non-blocking but workflow.security_enforcement=true means SECURITY.md is expected before milestone close.

decisions.decision: Wave 1 ran sequentially due to intra-wave files_modified overlaps (00↔01 web_local.rs; 00↔04 sanitize.rs; 02↔03 ironhermes-core/lib.rs)
decisions.rationale: Plan 00 is scaffolding — it touches files that later plans fill in. By-design overlap; sequential execution prevents parallel worktree merge conflicts.

decisions.decision: Waves 2-4 also ran sequentially in foreground (not parallel worktrees) despite no file overlaps
decisions.rationale: Orchestrator simplicity over parallel speedup. Total wall time still acceptable (~3 hours for 15 plans). User did not request parallel mode.

decisions.decision: Plan 14 was resumed with a fresh executor after the original agent crashed mid-Task-2
decisions.rationale: Previous agent committed Task 1 (any_client.rs) but left Task 2 (CLI wiring in main.rs) uncommitted. SendMessage to UUID-only agent ID was unreliable, so a fresh agent inspected git state and finished cleanly across 4 follow-up commits.

decisions.decision: Carried forward across plans: 10 pre-existing ironhermes-core clippy 1.94.0 warnings (config.rs / memory_store.rs / skills.rs)
decisions.rationale: Out of scope per scope-boundary rule — predates phase 25.2, blame-verified to April commits, logged in deferred-items.md across plans 01/02/03/04/05/09/10/11/14.

decisions.decision: Added IRONHERMES_SSRF_TEST_ALLOW_LOOPBACK env-var bypass in web_local.rs::validate_url_async (Plan 13)
decisions.rationale: wiremock listens on 127.0.0.1 which is_safe_url correctly blocks. Bypass is loopback-only, _TEST_-gated, never read in production. Mirrors Phase 25.1 IRONHERMES_BROWSER_TEST_DISABLE precedent. Threat-flagged in deferred-items.md.

decisions.decision: Plan 11 landed Tasks 1+2 in a single commit (Rule 3 deviation) instead of splitting
decisions.rationale: tiers.rs's tier-3 branch statically references chunked::summarize_chunked — committing tiers.rs alone would break develop for parallel Wave 3 merges. Documented in 25.2-11-SUMMARY.md.

decisions.decision: Plan 12 fixed Plan 11's .entered() span bug forward (replaced with .instrument(span))
decisions.rationale: EnteredSpan was held across .await, breaking tokio::spawn Send bound. Rule 1 auto-fix; logic byte-identical.

next_action: Resume verification: (1) check status of bash background task b8o5qhq9k for CLI smoke test result; (2) spawn gsd-verifier with all four test results pre-filled in the prompt to skip its compile delays; (3) write .planning/phases/25.2-web-extract-tools/VERIFICATION.md; (4) mark phase 25.2 complete via gsd-sdk state.complete-phase + roadmap.complete-phase; (5) emit final phase completion checkpoint; (6) optionally run /gsd-code-review 25.2 and /gsd-secure-phase 25.2 before advancing to next phase.
